summary: Subscription tiers and automation rules testing complete. All 15/15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: over-limit banner shows '12 schools on 5-school plan', upgrade modal displays correct pricing ($0/$29/$49) and features per tier matching the repo.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/subscription returns tier=basic, price=0, usage.schools=12, usage.schools_limit=5 for Emma
VERIFIED: GET /api/subscription/tiers returns all 3 tiers with correct pricing: basic=$0/5schools/0AI, pro=$29/25schools/10AI, premium=$49/unlimited
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/interactions with type='Email Sent' updates recruiting_status='Contacted' when 'Not Contacted'
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/interactions with type='Email Sent' sets reply_status='Awaiting Reply' when 'No Reply'
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/interactions with type='Email Sent' sets initial_contact_sent to today's date
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/interactions with type='Email Sent' sets next_action_due 14 days in future
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/programs/{pid}/mark-replied updates reply_status='Reply Received' and priority='Very High'
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/programs/{pid}/mark-replied sets next_action_due 2 days in future
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/programs/{pid}/mark-replied requires note (returns 400 for empty)
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/interactions with type='coach_reply' updates reply_status='Reply Received' and priority='Very High'
VERIFIED: POST /api/checkout/create-session validates tier (returns 400 for invalid tier)
VERIFIED: Stripe TIERS in stripe_checkout.py match subscription tiers: pro=$29, premium=$49
VERIFIED: Frontend over-limit banner displays 'You're tracking 12 schools on a 5-school plan' with 'Upgrade Plan' button
VERIFIED: UpgradeModal fetches tiers from API and displays correct pricing and feature lists
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen account with 12 schools on basic plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription tiers fully tested. Emma has 12 schools on basic (5-school limit) plan, triggering over-limit banner. Key data-testids: over-limit-banner, upgrade-from-banner, upgrade-modal, tier-card-basic, tier-card-pro, tier-card-premium. Automations working: email sent→Contacted/Awaiting Reply, mark-replied→Reply Received/Very High, next_action_due set correctly (14 days email, 2 days reply).

subscription_api.GET /api/subscription: WORKING - Returns tier info with usage stats
subscription_api.GET /api/subscription/tiers: WORKING - Returns all 3 tiers with correct pricing

tier_pricing.premium: CORRECT - $49, unlimited schools (-1), unlimited AI drafts (-1)
